title: The Battlefield Goes Silent
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on the straw hats become wanted heroes. News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Straw Hats Become Wanted Heroes sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Hey, listen! The bullets for our guns,

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: explode when they bump into each other!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Ribbit ribbit! Run as you might,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That dumbass took a full blast...

summary: News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
